title: Nakhon Si Thammarat、Nakhon Si Thammarat — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Nakhon Si Thammarat、Nakhon Si Thammarat的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Nakhon Si Thammarat是Nakhon Si Thammarat的一个城市，人口约120,000。An ancient southern city with a rich history, stunning temples, and one of the lowest costs of living in Thailand, ideal for those seeking authentic Thai culture.
